data.description: When you cast animate dead, you can target one additional corpse or pile of bones, as appropriate, and can create another zombie or skeleton.

Beginning 10th you resistance necrotic to at levei, have damage, your point be and hit maximum can't reduced. Vou spent much dealing undead and with have so time the that them you become forces animate that have inured some their effects.
Transmutation spells change the properties of a creature, object, or environment.
